debug_info.goal:
a✝ : GamePos
bt : BuildTree a✝
φ : Formula
π : PreState a✝ bt
⊢ φ ∈ PreState.forms a✝ bt π → φ.basic = true ∧ φ ∈ PreState.last a✝ bt π ∨ sorry

failed_attempts:
intro h
  left
  constructor
  · simpa using (Formula.basic_eq_true _)
  · simpa using h

intro hφ
  left
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · simp
  · simpa using hφ

intro h
  left
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩ <;> simp

intro hφ
  exact Or.inr (by trivial)

intro h
  left
  exact ⟨by simpa using (Formula.basic_iff.mp rfl), by
    -- `forms` is intended to collect (unloaded) formulas from the last sequent
    -- so membership implies membership in `last` (as non-loaded formula).
    simpa [PreState.forms, PreState.last] using h⟩

intro hφ
  left
  exact ⟨by simpa using φ.basic_eq_true, by
    -- `forms` is defined to collect formulas from the last sequent (unloaded part), so membership transfers.
    simpa [PreState.forms, PreState.last] using hφ⟩

intro h
  left
